summary: Verified BOM Grid alignment fix - all items now collapse by default, expand/collapse works correctly, and columns are properly aligned across all hierarchy levels
passed_tests: BOM Grid starts with all items collapsed by default (only Level 0 visible - ASM-12000)
Clicking expand arrow on parent row shows children underneath
Row alignment is correct - all columns align with headers regardless of level
Item # column content aligns properly with header (all at left=145px)
Level column displays correct level numbers (0, 1, 2)
Tree indentation is in expand/collapse column only (0px for L0, 16px for L1, 32px for L2)
Collapse functionality works - children removed when parent collapsed
Dashboard loads correctly with KPI stats (72% Progress, 8 Blockers, 23 At Risk, 5 Orderable)
Navigation between Dashboard and BOM Grid works bidirectionally
Pre-CO items displayed with orange highlight and badge
seed_data_creation: None - using existing bomData.js seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: BOM Grid alignment bug has been fixed. The expandedItems state now initializes as empty Set() instead of Set(['1', '2']), ensuring all items start collapsed. Tree indentation moved from Item # cell to expand/collapse column for proper alignment. All column alignment verified working correctly.

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Second line was offline from first line when collapsed - alignment error
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Changed default expandedItems from Set(['1', '2']) to empty Set() for collapsed default, 2) Moved tree indentation from Item # cell padding to expand/collapse column
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Items start collapsed, alignment is correct across all levels
